script: $listed = (winget list --id Anthropic.Claude -e --accept-source-agreements 2>$null | Select-String -SimpleMatch 'Anthropic.Claude'); if ($listed) { winget upgrade --id Anthropic.Claude -e --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements } else { winget install --id Anthropic.Claude -e --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements }
